/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/PixelBatch.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/PixelBatch.dir/greenScreenProcess.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PixelBatch.dir/greenScreen.cu.o CMakeFiles/PixelBatch.dir/image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PixelBatch.dir/stb_image_resize2.cpp.o -o PixelBatch   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
